inputs.label: Sample Mean
inputs.businessContext: The arithmetic mean of the sample measurements.

businessContext_i18n.en: The arithmetic mean of the sample measurements.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Moyenne arithmétique des mesures de l'échantillon.
businessContext_i18n.es: La media aritmética de las mediciones de la muestra.

inputs.label: Sample Standard Deviation
inputs.businessContext: The standard deviation of the sample, calculated with n-1 degrees of freedom.

businessContext_i18n.en: The standard deviation of the sample, calculated with n-1 degrees of freedom.
businessContext_i18n.tr: n-1 serbestlik derecesi ile hesaplanan örnek standart sapması
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Standardabweichung der Stichprobe, berechnet mit n-1 Freiheitsgraden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart type de l'échantillon, calculé avec n-1 degrés de liberté.
businessContext_i18n.es: La desviación estándar de la muestra, calculada con n-1 grados de libertad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الانحراف المعياري للعينة، محسوب بدرجات حرية n-1.

inputs.label: Sample Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of observations in the sample.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of observations in the sample.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Beobachtungen in der Stichprobe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de observaciones en la muestra.

inputs.label: Z-score for Proportion (p)
inputs.businessContext: Standard normal critical value for desired proportion. Common values: p=0.99 → zp=2.326, p=0.95 → zp=1.645.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard normal critical value for desired proportion. Common values: p=0.99 → zp=2.326, p=0.95 → zp=1.645.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstenen oran için standart normal kritik değer. Yaygın değerler: p=0.99 → zp=2.326, p=0.95 → zp=1.645.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardnormaler kritischer Wert für den gewünschten Anteil. Übliche Werte: p=0,99 → zp=2,326, p=0,95 → zp=1,645.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur critique normale standard pour la proportion souhaitée. Valeurs courantes : p=0,99 → zp=2,326, p=0,95 → zp=1,645.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor crítico normal estándar para la proporción deseada. Valores comunes: p=0.99 → zp=2.326, p=0.95 → zp=1.645.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة الحرجة المعيارية الطبيعية للنسبة المطلوبة. القيم الشائعة: p=0.99 → zp=2.326، p=0.95 → zp=1.645.

inputs.label: Z-score for Confidence (γ)
inputs.businessContext: Standard normal critical value for confidence level. Common values: γ=0.95 → zγ=1.645, γ=0.99 → zγ=2.326.

label_i18n.fr: Score Z pour le niveau de confiance (γ)

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard normal critical value for confidence level. Common values: γ=0.95 → zγ=1.645, γ=0.99 → zγ=2.326.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güven düzeyi için standart normal kritik değer. Yaygın değerler: γ=0.95 → zγ=1.645, γ=0.99 → zγ=2.326.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardnormaler kritischer Wert für das Konfidenzniveau. Übliche Werte: γ=0,95 → zγ=1,645, γ=0,99 → zγ=2,326.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur critique normale standard pour le niveau de confiance. Valeurs courantes : γ=0,95 → zγ=1,645, γ=0,99 → zγ=2,326.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor crítico normal estándar para el nivel de confianza. Valores comunes: γ=0.95 → zγ=1.645, γ=0.99 → zγ=2.326.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة الحرجة المعيارية الطبيعية لمستوى الثقة. القيم الشائعة: γ=0.95 → zγ=1.645، γ=0.99 → zγ=2.326.

inputs.label: Limit Direction
inputs.businessContext: 1 for upper tolerance limit, 0 for lower tolerance limit.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 for upper tolerance limit, 0 for lower tolerance limit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 üst tolerans limiti için, 0 alt tolerans limiti için.
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 für obere Toleranzgrenze, 0 für untere Toleranzgrenze.
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 pour la limite de tolérance supérieure, 0 pour la limite de tolérance inférieure.
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 para límite de tolerancia superior, 0 para límite de tolerancia inferior.
businessContext_i18n.ar: 1 لحد التسامح العلوي، 0 لحد التسامح السفلي.
